role_title: Associate Manager, New Verticals - Convenience Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: a few days a month in person together

level_signals: Individual contributor position reporting into a Senior Manager
Title is 'Associate Manager' — IC role despite manager title

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4-6+ years of experience. You've succeeded in similar cultures that are highly analytical and cross-functional (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and building models in excel.
Build models using Excel and SQL to evaluate the economic, operational and strategic costs and benefits of various programs and experiments
You solve problems from first principles. You have a talent for synthesizing complex problems, can translate high-level goals into actionable plans, and enjoy implementing a process
You'll partner with and influence cross-functional teams including growth, quality, finance, product and engineering to launch initiatives to the finish line.
You are an owner. You're always looking for opportunities to better your work product and own the outcome – both the good and the bad

You're energized by AI tools — and you actively experiment with them. You don't wait to be told how to use a new tool; you've already tried it. You bring a builder's mindset to AI: using it to automate the repetitive, accelerate the analytical, and unlock work that would otherwise require a larger team.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environment
You have a completed Bachelor's Degree.

scope.surface: Convenience vertical within DoorDash New Verticals — fulfillment strategy, inventory precision, operational roadmap
scope.business_model: marketplace / on-demand delivery (B2C and B2B merchant-side)
primary_metrics_inferred: Week-over-week operational metrics on tracking dashboards
core_responsibilities: Architect the fulfillment strategy of DoorDash's convenience network by overseeing and streamlining in-store fulfillment
Drive enterprise inventory precision by spearheading cross-functional initiatives to ensure real-time data syncs between platform inventory and actual in-store availability
Own the operational roadmap by setting the long-term vision and establishing key metrics
Own tracking dashboards and manage week over week metrics to drive high quality operations
Use AI tools to automate manual processes, build new prototypes and develop product visions
Build models using Excel and SQL to evaluate economic, operational and strategic costs and benefits
Partner with and influence cross-functional teams to launch initiatives

green_flags: Equity grants included in comp package
Clear product surface and vertical ownership (Convenience within New Verticals)
Hybrid model with minimal in-person requirement (a few days a month)
Comprehensive benefits package including 16 weeks paid parental leave and 401(k) with employer matching
Role is at a high-growth, well-funded company with established scale
red_flags: Title says 'Associate Manager' but is an individual contributor role — title may be misleading for candidates expecting people management
No visa sponsorship information stated — unclear for international candidates
AI tool usage is framed as a hard expectation with evolving scope, which may signal role instability as AI capabilities change
4-6+ years range is somewhat wide; actual bar unclear without recruiter clarification

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range, years required, and IC designation)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and vertical context)
location.cities_listed (not role-specific cities named; left empty)
ambiguities: Years experience stated as '4-6+ years' — the '+' after 6 makes the upper bound open-ended; minimum treated as 4.
Location type: JD says 'hybrid model' with 'a few days a month in person' but no specific cities for this role are mentioned — cities_listed left empty.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not mentioned in the JD body.
